title: Kunming, Yunnan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kunming, Yunnan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kunming is a city in Yunnan with a population of 8,460,000. Known as the ‘Spring City’ for its year-round mild climate, Kunming is the gateway to Yunnan’s ethnic minority cultures and stunning landscapes.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
